productDisplayName: Crocs Unisex Modi Flip Khaki Sky Blue Flip Flop
description: Enjoy summer in these stylish khaki flip flops from crocs. The blue croslite footbed provides ergonomic Fit and comfort, coupled with superior shock absorption. The leaf pattern and blue pivot points on the outsole provide superior grip and stability, making it a perfect footwear for a day on the beach or for urban life.UpperEVA upper in thong design for lightweight feel, comfort and durabilityEVA material that moulds to the shape of the feet offering ergonomic comfortBranding buttons on upper for styleMidsoleEVA footbed with horizontal lines and raised area in the silhouette of the foot for ergonomic comfort and acupressureCrocs branding on mid heel for comfort and styleFungus, bacteria and odour resistant for a healthy wear even in wet conditionsMild heel cup on the footbed to support the heelOutsoleSlip resistant outsoleMulti-directional textured grooves on the forefoot and backfoot for ample grip, stability and comfortshoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
